programmes.show_description: Brent and his son Cayden set off on an adventure to find highly valuable, crystalline gold. Plus, Sheryl and Simon hit it big on new ground. S10, Ep12

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: In Dumfries and Galloway, Henry and Simon meet a well-travelled collector of vintage cars. They unearth an air raid siren, a 1960s pinball machine and chest of drawers. S4, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: In Pembrokeshire, Henry and Simon meet a cattle farmer whose barns are brimming with treasure. And they find a vintage pedal car that makes them feel young at heart. S4, Ep12
